description: Fallthrough-detection enrichment: has_fallthrough, fallthrough_count. Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen — C/C++ fixture switch fallthrough patterns plus Rust match-arm fallthrough counts.

cases.name: fallthrough_in_cpp_fixture
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name MATCHES '^fallthrough' WHERE has_fallthrough='true' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: fallthrough_count_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/parser/clauses.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='parse_clauses' WHERE fallthrough_count=10 LIMIT 5

cases.name: fallthrough_high_global
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_fallthrough='true' WHERE fallthrough_count>=10 LIMIT 100

cases.name: negative_fixture_none_no_fallthrough
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='fallthroughNone' WHERE has_fallthrough='true' LIMIT 5
